scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c cyan,orange "npm --workspace frontend run dev" "npm --workspace backend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c cyan,orange "npm --workspace backend run start" "npm --workspace frontend run start"
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace backend run typecheck && npm --workspace frontend run typecheck
